signals.headline: XRP Outperforms BTC, ETH, SOL on Rakuten Wallet Listing & SEC Crypto Roundtable; Solana Teases XRP Integration | YES | H
signals.raw:
XRP Outperforms BTC, ETH, SOL on Rakuten Wallet Listing & SEC Crypto Roundtable; Solana Teases XRP Integration | YES | HIGH**  
Rakuten Wallet listed XRP yesterday, driving a 4% price surge to $1.41 and strong ETF inflows of $119.6M for the week ending April 11, while the SEC's crypto roundtable occurred today amid CLARITY Act markup anticipation in late April (60% odds on Polymarket).[1]  
Solana

signals.headline: South Korea's inflation rose above central bank target in March** | YES | HIGH confidence
signals.raw:
South Korea's inflation rose above central bank target in March** | YES | HIGH confidence

South Korea's **annual inflation rate climbed to 2.2% in March 2026**, up from 2.0% in both January and February, marking a breach of the Bank of Korea's 2% target[2]. This increase came in below market forecasts of 2.4%, but the upward movement signals renewed inflationary pressures[2].

signals.headline: US-Iran Ceasefire Talks Set for April 16 as Deadline Nears; Russia Welcomes Prior Deal, No Ukraine Ceasefire Link** | YE
signals.raw:
US-Iran Ceasefire Talks Set for April 16 as Deadline Nears; Russia Welcomes Prior Deal, No Ukraine Ceasefire Link** | YES | MED confidence[7][1][2]
